note.item: JED Checker compliance update focused on Joomla Manual license header alignment.

addition.item: Added LICENSE.txt to the installation package.

change.item: Updated module version to 0.3.4.
Updated PHP file headers to match the Joomla Manual license format.
Changed PHP file license headers to GNU General Public License version 2 or later; see LICENSE.txt.
Updated manifest file list to include LICENSE.txt.
Updated media asset registry version to 0.3.4.

fix.item: Improved JED Checker compatibility by aligning license metadata with Joomla extension examples.

note.item: Manifest license compatibility update for Joomla Manual alignment.

change.item: Updated module version to 0.3.3.
Updated the manifest license value to GNU General Public License version 2 or later.
Updated media asset registry version to 0.3.3.

fix.item: Improved JED Checker compatibility for manifest license validation.

note.item: Manifest validation update for JED Checker compatibility.

change.item: Updated module version to 0.3.2.
Updated media asset registry version to 0.3.2.

fix.item: Removed the unsupported php_minimum element from the extension manifest.
Kept PHP minimum requirement handling in the Joomla update server XML only.

note.item: Patch release focused on Bootstrap 5 button output and Joomla administrator naming.

change.item: Updated module version to 0.3.1.
Updated the Joomla administrator module name to JT Image Accordion.
Updated administrator language strings for consistent extension naming.

fix.item: Removed legacy jt-accordion-card__button class from frontend button markup.
Normalized saved legacy jt-btn-hover-* button values to native Bootstrap 5 btn-* classes.
Prevented custom accordion button classes from appearing in frontend output.
Fixed inconsistent module naming in Joomla administrator module listings.

note.item: Maintenance and compatibility release focused on Joomla 6.1.x and Bootstrap 5 alignment.

addition.item: Added a new parameter to optionally display sample cards.
Added Bootstrap modal dependency to the Web Asset Manager asset definition.

change.item: Updated module version to 0.3.0.
Changed frontend button rendering to use native Bootstrap 5 btn-* classes directly.
Removed custom jt-btn-hover-* button style handling.
Cleaned up custom CSS to avoid duplicating Bootstrap 5 button behavior.
Simplified modal markup by relying more on Bootstrap 5 utility classes.
Disabled automatic sample card rendering by default for safer production usage.
Updated media asset registry version to 0.3.0.
Updated English and Turkish administrator language strings.

fix.item: Prevented sample content from appearing unintentionally on the frontend when no cards are configured.
Blocked data: image URI usage in image fields.
Filtered unsafe CTA URL schemes such as javascript: and vbscript:.
Prevented negative CSS size values from being accepted.
Removed unnecessary fallback modal styling and scripting complexity.

note.item: First JoomTheme-branded test release under the mod_jt_image_accordion element.

addition.item: Added hover image accordion layout with Bootstrap 5 modal support.
Added optional diagonal modal opening animation.
Added repeatable card fields for image, description, button and modal content.
Added Joomla update server and changelog XML support.

change.item: Updated display name to JoomTheme Image Accordion.
Improved Turkish and English administrator language strings.
Updated asset registry names and media destination to mod_jt_image_accordion.

fix.item: Normalized module element, language prefix and PHP namespace for the new repository name.
